mapper.insert: insert into homework ( title, content, course_id, teacher_id, publish_time, deadline ) values ( #{title}, #{content}, #{courseId}, #{teacherId}, #{publishTime}, #{deadline} )
mapper.select:
select
h.id as id,
h.title as title,
h.content as content,
h.course_id as courseId,
c.course_name as courseName,
h.teacher_id as teacherId,
u.real_name as teacherName,
h.publish_time as publishTime,
h.deadline as deadline
from homework h
left join course c on h.course_id = c.id
left join user u on h.teacher_id = u.id
order by h.id desc

select h.id as id, h.title as title, h.content as content, h.course_id as courseId, c.course_name as courseName, h.teacher_id as teacherId, u.real_name as teacherName, h.publish_time as publishTime, h.deadline as deadline from homework h left join course c on h.course_id = c.id left join user u on h.teacher_id = u.id where h.teacher_id = #{teacherId} order by h.id desc
select count(*) from homework where teacher_id = #{teacherId}
select count(*) from homework h left join user_course uc on h.course_id = uc.course_id where uc.user_id = #{studentId}
